description: The Compton Executioners is a deputy gang within the Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department (LASD), based at the Compton station. Founded by former 2000 Boys member Andy Toone, its members share a distinctive calf tattoo. The gang is involved in police corruption and has been linked to the Lynwood Vikings. In July 2021, Congresswoman Maxine Waters called for a Department of Justice inquiry into the gang.
